variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16036 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16036 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16036 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 85.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 42.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 163.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 153.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26188 Air Filter Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16036
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26188 Air Filter Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16036
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF26188 air breather is designed to filter out contaminants before they reach your engine.
